ad_texts:
Enjoy benefits of electric driving, without the need to charge. 
Discover our range of hybrid crossovers, including Nissan Juke, Qashqai and X-Trail.
Switch to Nissan JUKE: Perfect Compact SUV, now starting from €30,900. Discover More. T&Cs Apply.

Don’t know where to begin your new car journey? Start with Nissan. 

The Nissan X-Trail has everything you need. Plus, get €4K Your Way on all new models. 

Nissan. Always a smart move.

*T&C Apply

Nissan is always a smart move and now it’s even smarter.

With the new government scrappage scheme combined with our 'Get €4K Your Way' offer you can save up to €12,500 across the Nissan EV range.*

Don’t miss out, secure your new Nissan today.

*T&Cs Apply.

Don’t know where to begin your new car journey? Start with Nissan. 

The Nissan Qashqai has everything you need. Plus, get €4K Your Way on all new models.* 

Nissan. Always a smart move.

*T&Cs Apply.

Nissan is always a smart move and now it’s even smarter.

With the new government scrappage scheme & our 'Get 4K your way' offer, you can save up to €12,500 on a brand new Nissan ARIYA. *

Don’t miss out, secure your new Nissan today.

*T&Cs Apply.

Don’t know where to begin your new car journey? Start with Nissan. 

The Nissan Qashqai has everything you need. Plus, get €4K Your Way on all new models. *

Nissan. Always a smart move.

*T&Cs Apply.

ad_texts: Switch to Nissan ARIYA's Premium Performance, now starting from €39,995. Discover More. T&Cs Apply.
Choose €4,000 finance contribution  or €4,000 trade-in bonus when you buy a selected 261 Nissan.
Drive the family-friendly Nissan X-Trail e-POWER now at €108/week on 5.9% PCP. Book a Test Drive now.
Get the best of both worlds with Nissan Hybrid. Enjoy the smooth experience of an EV backed by the reliability of petrol.

The wait is over. The All-New Nissan Micra is here. 
And now, it’s 100% electric. Over to you . . .
We’re offering you €4000 towards a brand new Nissan Ariya. Where electric meets elegance.
Choose €4,000 finance contribution or €4,000 trade-in bonus when you buy a selected 261 Nissan.

Drive the Nissan JUKE Hybrid – Smart, Sporty, and Fuel Efficient.

Get €4K Your Way – Choose between €4,000 finance contribution or a €4,000 Trade in Bonus.

Download our Brochure today. T&Cs Apply.
